## Notes

- `decisions/`, `presentations/`, `progress/` directories exist but are empty.
- `source/` contains raw + `_formatted` variants for each transcript (formatted versions produced by `scripts/format_transcript.py`). The formatted versions are the intended read targets.
- Two PNGs in source (`selva_and_team_4-6-2026__1.png`, `__2.png`) are likely screenshots referenced in the 2026-04-06 walkthrough transcript.
- Most recent source material: 2026-04-06 (Selva + team big meeting).
- Most recent research synthesis: 2026-04-07 (Set 08 conversion pattern research).
- Most recent planning doc: 2026-04-07.
- Today is 2026-04-20 — ~13 days since the last documented engagement activity.
